steps.title: This protocol performs aliquoting from 7...
steps.instruction: This protocol performs aliquoting from 7 different tube racks (first 96 tubes) into a 96 well plate. It then aliquots from a 12-well reservoir into the deep well plate.

steps.title: Aliquot 200uL from the approximately 7...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 200uL from the approximately 7 tube racks into 96 well plate

steps.title: Aliquot 275uL from 15mL-12 section reservoir...
steps.instruction: Aliquot 275uL from 15mL-12 section reservoir into the deep well plate change tips for each row.
